title: 20 Takes 1st Place at Lyon Asian Film Fest

wikitext:
[]: 2.0 Takes 1st Place at Lyon Asian Film Fest             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Nov 13, 2009 7:23 pm [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2009-11-13/eva-2.0-wins-1st-in-animation-at-lyon-asian-film-fest[/url] Just passing it along.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Sat Nov 14, 2009 5:28 am As someone who has yet to see 2.0 but has encountered nay-sayers, this helps me keep faith it will totally f'in amazing.
